component.name: ResumeVideo
component.script:
sub init() ''print "In ResumeVideo" m.top.functionName = "resume" end sub
sub resume() 'print "ResumeVideo.xml - [resume]" read = regread(m.top.id, m.top.section) if read <> invalid and read.toint() >=10 then m.top.pos = read.toint() else m.top.pos = 0 end if end sub
